'''''Fubarium''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]]. It was part of [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility]] [[Drekker]]'s procedure that, should the station's hull be critically damaged, the shuttle would launch, carrying officers. The shuttle in this case would make a run for the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Inexorable (Victory-class)|''Inexorable'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
